description: Prioritized next steps from the pure AI agent perspective to turn your already elite foundation into fully autonomous, production-grade agents.

roadmap.whyItMatters: Turns “propose → approve” into “propose → approve → send → confirm delivery → update thread”. This is the #1 value driver for hosts.
quickImplementationPath: Add Twilio/WhatsApp Business or Resend/SendGrid integration (or use existing messaging service)
On approval webhook: call `send_guest_message` tool with idempotency_key
Add delivery/status webhook listener → update `ai_chat_messages` + approval record
Show “Sent ✓” + timestamp in admin chat + mobile inbox

roadmap.whyItMatters: Let users (and you) instantly test the full power of the 79+ tools + RAG resources. Perfect for dogfooding and demos.
quickImplementationPath: New admin page `/agent/playground`
Use `@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` to connect to your MCP server
Pre-load prompt: “Reply to guest Maria about late check-in using house rules”
Add session history + tool-call visualization

roadmap.whyItMatters: Enables true multi-agent collaboration instead of siloed agents (AnomalyDetection → TaskTriage → GuestComm).
quickImplementationPath: Add `supervisor` type in `ai_agents` table
Implement router (LLM tool-calling or simple rule-based using `workflow_rules`)
Spawn sub-`workflow_jobs` for specialized agents

roadmap.whyItMatters: Agents become personalized instead of generic (“Remember Maria always asks about WiFi”).
quickImplementationPath: Add `guest_memory_summaries` table or enrich `ai_chat_messages` with `guest_id` filter
Extend RAG resource: `casaora://org/{orgId}/guest/{guestId}/history`
Auto-summarize every chat on close

roadmap.whyItMatters: Stop flying blind on quality and continuously improve.
quickImplementationPath: LLM-as-judge (Claude) scoring for tone/accuracy/completeness
Thumbs-up/down in inbox → `agent_feedback` table
Monthly eval report in the new analytics dashboard

roadmap.whyItMatters: One of the highest-ROI agents in short-term rentals.
quickImplementationPath: Connect market data (or partner API)
Enhance with RAG for local events/regs
Full flow: analyze → propose → approve → update price + calendar

roadmap.goal: Voice Agent Live + No-Code Builder Teaser
roadmap.whyItMatters: Make ElevenLabs voice fully functional and start letting users build their own agents.
quickImplementationPath: Hook voice to MCP tools
UI: drag-drop tools + system prompt editor

recommendedNextSprint.title: Recommended Next Sprint (Days 1–7)
recommendedNextSprint.goal: Ship at least one agent that fully autonomously completes a real guest interaction (human approval only for the send step).
deliverables: End-to-End Guest Reply flow (detection → approval → delivery → confirmation)
Updated AGENTS.md with “End-to-End Flows” section + new Mermaid sequence diagram

whatICanGiveYouRightNow: Full code for the approval → WhatsApp/SMS execution handler (including webhook listener)
New Mermaid diagrams ready for AGENTS.md
Eval prompt templates (LLM-as-judge for guest replies)
Ready-to-copy PR description + Linear ticket template
closingNote: You’re moving at warp speed. The foundation is genuinely elite — now it’s time to make the agents do the real work. What do you want to ship first?
